title: After the Arima Kinen: God-Tier Freedom

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer runs in the Arima Kinen. Her return
to the Twinkle Series feels so fulfilling that she
literally shakes from her emotions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has their eyes on Oguri Cap, who also
runs spectacularly despite the pressure. She tells
Mejiro Palmer that she turns that pressure into
power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer declares that she'll get strong
enough to never worry about pressure.
